sourcesContent:
export const MONTH_THEMES = [
    // January
    {
        primary: "#1a3a5c",
        accent: "#4a90d9",
        light: "#e8f4fd",
        text: "#0d2137",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3a5c 0%, #4a90d9 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516912481808-3406841bd33c?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Snowy mountain peak",
        mood: "Crisp Winter",
    },
    // February
    {
        primary: "#7b2d8b",
        accent: "#e91e8c",
        light: "#fce4f5",
        text: "#3d1645",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #7b2d8b 0%, #e91e8c 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518895949257-7621c3c786d7?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Red roses in bloom",
        mood: "Romantic Winter",
    },
    // March
    {
        primary: "#1b6b3a",
        accent: "#4caf50",
        light: "#e8f5e9",
        text: "#0d3320",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1b6b3a 0%, #4caf50 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1462275646964-a0e3386b89fa?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Spring green forest",
        mood: "Spring Awakening",
    },
    // April
    {
        primary: "#4a6741",
        accent: "#f9a825",
        light: "#fffde7",
        text: "#2d3e29",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #4a6741 0%, #f9a825 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1490750967868-88df5691cc7e?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Cherry blossoms",
        mood: "Blossom Season",
    },
    // May
    {
        primary: "#006064",
        accent: "#00bcd4",
        light: "#e0f7fa",
        text: "#002d2f",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #006064 0%, #00bcd4 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1462678086641-04d495e1b9ef?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Colorful wildflowers",
        mood: "Full Bloom",
    },
    // June
    {
        primary: "#e65100",
        accent: "#ff9800",
        light: "#fff3e0",
        text: "#6d2800",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #e65100 0%, #ff9800 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507525428034-b723cf961d3e?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Tropical beach sunset",
        mood: "Summer Solstice",
    },
    // July
    {
        primary: "#b71c1c",
        accent: "#ef5350",
        light: "#ffebee",
        text: "#5c0d0d",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #b71c1c 0%, #ef5350 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1467810563316-b5476525c0f9?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Fireworks over city",
        mood: "Peak Summer",
    },
    // August
    {
        primary: "#4e342e",
        accent: "#ff7043",
        light: "#fbe9e7",
        text: "#2c1810",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #4e342e 0%, #ff7043 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504701954957-2010ec3bcec1?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Golden wheat fields",
        mood: "Late Summer",
    },
    // September
    {
        primary: "#4a148c",
        accent: "#ab47bc",
        light: "#f3e5f5",
        text: "#220d40",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #4a148c 0%, #ab47bc 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Purple lavender fields",
        mood: "Early Autumn",
    },
    // October
    {
        primary: "#bf360c",
        accent: "#ff6d00",
        light: "#fbe9e7",
        text: "#5c1a05",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #bf360c 0%, #ff6d00 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1508739773434-c26b3d09e071?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Autumn forest foliage",
        mood: "Harvest Season",
    },
    // November
    {
        primary: "#37474f",
        accent: "#78909c",
        light: "#eceff1",
        text: "#1c2d35",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #37474f 0%, #78909c 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477414348463-c0eb7f1359b6?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Misty autumn forest",
        mood: "Deep Autumn",
    },
    // December
    {
        primary: "#1a237e",
        accent: "#e53935",
        light: "#e8eaf6",
        text: "#0d1442",
        gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1a237e 0%, #e53935 100%)",
        image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512389142860-9c449e58a543?w=800&q=80",
        imageAlt: "Snowy Christmas night",
        mood: "Winter Magic",
    },
];

export const MONTH_NAMES = [
    "January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June",
    "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"
];

export const DAY_NAMES = ["Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"];
